text.title: tool-migration-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tool-migration-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Picking the simplest team for the pilot project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates false confidence; the simplest team has the fewest edge cases and the most forgiving stakeholders. Failures surface in Phase 4 at scale instead.

failure-mode.description: Skipping @mention and user-ID resolution during comment migration.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strips all @mentions silently, breaking notification chains and audit trails for team collaboration history.

failure-mode.description: Agent marks checklist steps complete based on stdout text matches rather than process exit codes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Text matches lie; a process can print "success" while returning exit code 1. Use exit codes for machine-verified steps.
